title: ficus gibbosa var. cuneata
intro: Ficus gibbosa var. cuneata, also known as the 'Warty Ficus', is a plant species belonging to the family Moraceae. It is traditionally used in Southeast Asian folk medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Ficus gibbosa var. cuneata include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are often made into tea or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
